subject: Cannot log in to my account
description: I have been unable to log in since yesterday morning using my usual credentials.

subject: App crashes on startup
description: The mobile app crashes immediately on launch after the latest update was installed.

subject: Duplicate charge on my invoice
description: I have been billed twice for the same subscription period this month.

subject: Please add dark mode to the interface
description: A dark mode option would greatly reduce eye strain for users who work in low-light environments.

subject: Clicking submit button causes 400 error
description: The submit button on the new ticket form consistently returns HTTP 400 with no error message.

subject: General question about SLA policy
description: I would like to understand the response time commitment for different ticket priority levels.

subject: Password reset link expired immediately
description: The password reset email arrives but the link is already expired when I click it.

subject: API returns 500 errors intermittently
description: Our integration receives HTTP 500 responses roughly every ten requests during peak hours.

subject: Refund not received after 14 days
description: I requested a refund two weeks ago and have not seen it credited on my bank statement.

subject: Mobile push notification support
description: Please add push notification support to both the iOS and Android mobile applications.

subject: Filter dropdown resets on page refresh
description: Applying a category filter and then refreshing the page clears the selection every time.

subject: Data export compliance request
description: We need a full data export for GDPR compliance purposes and require it within 30 days.

subject: Two-factor authentication code rejected
description: My authenticator app generates a code but the system rejects it every time during login.

subject: Role-based access control per module
description: Administrators need to grant per-module permissions rather than relying on all-or-nothing roles.

subject: Invoice shows wrong currency
description: My invoices are displayed in USD although my account region is set to EUR in settings.

subject: Error 503 on bulk import endpoint
description: The import endpoint returns 503 Service Unavailable for any file larger than 1 megabyte.

subject: Requesting a demo for my team
description: Our team of twenty would like to schedule a product demonstration before purchasing a plan.

subject: Dashboard widgets not loading
description: Three of the five dashboard widgets show an infinite spinner and never display data.

subject: Subscription auto-renewed unexpectedly
description: My annual subscription renewed automatically even though I had cancelled it three weeks ago.

subject: Accessibility: screen reader labels missing
description: Several interactive buttons and form inputs are not labelled correctly for screen reader users.
